attributes.name: [Memcached OTel] Get hit ratio 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the cache hit ratio for get operations via OTel metrics. The memcachedreceiver reports operation_hit_ratio as miss ratio (see OTel contrib #30695), so we target miss ratio ≤ 5% (equivalent to hit ratio ≥ 95%). A timeslice is good when the average miss ratio over 1 minute is at or below 5%. Ensures 99.5% of 1-minute windows meet this target over a rolling 30 days, protecting application latency and backing-store load.
